messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.





Now I'll analyze the Lipid Panel PDF using the BloomCell framework. Based on the document (`Lipid_Panel_with_Ratios..pdf`), I will produce the full 8-object analysis covering the standard lipid panel biomarkers: Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides, and key ratios (Total Cholesterol/HDL, LDL/HDL).



The analysis of the **Lipid Panel with Ratios** PDF, applying the BloomCell clinical framework, yields the following 8 structured records. I will now build the merged records and save them to Cosmos DB one by one.

---

**Step 5 — Saving records to Cosmos DB**

Saving record 1 of 8 (Internal Notes — highlight):✅ Record 1 saved. Saving record 2 of 8 (Internal Notes — note):✅ Record 2 saved. Saving record 3 of 8 (Understanding Your Results — highlight):✅ Record 3 saved. Saving record 4 of 8 (Understanding Your Results — note):✅ Record 4 saved. Saving record 5 of 8 (Priority Actions — highlight):✅ Record 5 saved. Saving record 6 of 8 (Priority Actions — note):✅ Record 6 saved. Saving record 7 of 8 (Long-Term Strategy — highlight):✅ Record 7 saved. Saving record 8 of 8 (Long-Term Strategy — note):

8 records saved successfully.

---

**Step 6 — Updating original PatientDocument in Cosmos DB**



Document updated successfully.
